home.title: Start a Retrospective
home.subtitle: Create a board and share the link with your team.
home.note: No signup required. Anyone with the link can participate.
home.join.placeholder: Paste a link or board code
home.hero.desc: Create a board, send the link — your team joins instantly. No accounts, no setup.
home.step1.title: Create
home.step1.desc: A board or a space. No signup, no email.
home.step2.title: Share
home.step2.desc: Send the link to your team — anyone joins instantly.
home.step3.title: Discuss
home.step3.desc: Cards, votes, comments — in real time. One-click export.
home.footer.tagline: Retrospectrix · an open source tool for retrospectives
home.mock.card3: The billing bug ate half the sprint
new.title: What are we creating?
new.subtitle: No signup — the link appears right after creation.
new.board.title: Board
new.board.desc: One retrospective: three columns, votes, a timer. Ready in a second.
new.space.title: Space
new.space.desc: A team's retro series: sprint history, password protection.
new.board.name: Board title
new.space.name: Space name
new.board.note: The team link and the admin link will appear right away
new.space.note: The space link will appear right away
summary.title: Summary
summary.empty: No cards yet. Add some cards to see the summary.
export.title: Export
apiDocs.title: API
apiDocs.subtitle: Read-only access to boards for scripts and AI agents
apiDocs.intro: Every board is addressable by its board code — the same code that is in the link you share with your team. No API keys, no signup: the board code is the access key.
apiDocs.security.title: Link = access
apiDocs.security.desc: Anyone who knows a board code can read the board through the API — exactly like the board page itself. Share links deliberately.
apiDocs.endpoints.title: Endpoints
apiDocs.md.title: Board as Markdown
apiDocs.md.desc: Returns the board as Markdown: columns, cards, votes and comments. Give this URL to an AI agent to turn your retro into a list of action items. No authentication — access by board code.
apiDocs.json.title: Board as JSON
apiDocs.json.desc: Returns the board as JSON: columns, cards, votes, comments, image links and timestamps. No authentication — access by board code.
apiDocs.params.title: Parameters
apiDocs.params.lang: language of section headings in Markdown: en (default) or ru
apiDocs.example.title: Example
apiDocs.limits.title: Limits and errors
apiDocs.limits.rate: 30 requests per minute per IP — 429 when exceeded
admin.banner.title: Board created — share it!
admin.banner.desc: Save the link below — it's the only way to manage the timer and delete the board from another device or browser.
admin.banner.saved: Saved? Then you can close this.
